Programme Analyst - Democratic and Effective Governance - NOA [Open to internal and external applicants]
summary: The Programme Analyst will support the design and implementation of integrated interventions that combine institutional effectiveness, transparency, participation, and innovation capacity, along with inclusion, local development, digital transformation, innovation, gender equality, and data-informed decision-making. This position contributes to SDG acceleration by developing accountable, people-centered, and rights-based governance systems and arrangements that are central to human development.
